hero.title: Support the parish and its mission
hero.lede: A dedicated page for the main parish giving link and any additional support opportunities.

intro.title: A simple place for parish support
intro.body: The main parish giving link should be prominent, with any secondary support links clearly separated below.
intro.asideBody: Replace this placeholder giving link with the real online giving page or donations platform.

cards.title: Parish giving link
paragraphs: Use this card for the main parish giving page or online donations platform.
cards.note: Add the real parish giving link before launch.

cards.title: Support parish outreach
paragraphs: This section can list foodbank links, special appeals, or partner organisations connected with the parish mission.

cards.title: Contact the parish office
paragraphs: Use this area for the office contact details if someone needs help with a donation or has a stewardship question.
